Latest News

Follow on Facebook

Visit Facebook

Agricultural Forum Launch

Recently I lanuched my first Agricultural Forum and was delighted to be joined on the panel by the Shadow Secretary of State for DEFRA, the Rural Crime Team Inspector at Northamptonshire Police, the West Northamptonshire Council Cabinet Member for Local Economy, Culture and Leisure and the NFU County Advisor for Northamptonshire.

I'd like to say a huge thank you to the 100+ farmers who attended, as well as the panel and all those who helped to make the forum happen behind the scenes.

I'm planning our next meeting this October. If you're interested in attending or if I can assist you in any way, please email me at [email protected]

Stuart Andrew MP Member of Parliament for the Daventry Constituency
